zh.lifeSummary: 當Curtis Land Sr於1634年11月30日之前出生在英國英格蘭越可爾丹特時，他的父親William Land III34歲，母親Marye Not37歲。他於1662年與Mary Hodges在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1683年4月20日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Curtis Land Sr于1634年11月30日之前出生在英国英格兰越可爾丹特时，他的父亲William Land III34岁，母亲Marye Not37岁。他于1662年与Mary Hodges在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1683年4月20日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪。

nameMeanings.name: Land
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: topographic name from Old English, Middle Dutch land, Middle High German lant ‘land, territory’. This had more specialized senses in the Middle Ages, being used to denote the countryside as opposed to a town or an estate.
English: topographic name from Middle English launde ‘glade’ (Old French land), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Launde in Leicestershire or Laund in Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads so named, from Old Norse land ‘land, territory’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lander
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic or status name from Middle High German lant, German Land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 1). Compare Landmann .
German: topographic name from Middle High German lander ‘picket fence’.
German: from the personal name Lanther, see Landherr 1.

variants.name: Lands
meanings: English: variant of   Land  .

variants.name: Landt
meanings: German: variant of   Land   1.

variants.name: Lande
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, so named from either the dative singular or the plural form of land (see Land 3).
German: from the old personal name Lando, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with lant ‘land’ (see Land ).

French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, moor, French lande (from Gaulish landa ‘space, land’), or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called La Lande from this word. Compare Lalande .

variants.name: Landfried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantel.
South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ (see Land ) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).

variants.name: Lawn
meanings: English:
variant of   Land   2.
from Middle English laun ‘lawn, fine linen’ (French laun, from the name of the city of Laon), perhaps for a maker or trader.

variants.name: Landa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Enrique, Jesus, Julio, Mario, Roberto, Miguel.

Basque: topographic name from landa ‘(large) field, prairie’. There is a place of this name in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain), and the surname may also be a habitational name from this place.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southwestern Norway, so named from the plural of land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 3).

variants.name: Lant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Land   with devoicing of the final consonant.

nameMeanings.name: Curtis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as a nickname for someone who was ‘courteous’ (Old French curteis). At an early date, however, it came to be associated with Middle English curt ‘short’ + hose ‘leggings’ compare Courtney .

variants.name: Kurtis
meanings: Respelling of   Curtis  , influenced by   Kurt  , to which, however, it is not related.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Curtis Land Sr was born before 30 November 1634, in Dent, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Land III, was 34 and his mother, Marye Not, was 37. He married Mary Hodges in 1662, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 20 April 1683, in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Curtis Land Sr est né avant 30 novembre 1634, à Dent, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Land III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Marye Not, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hodges en 1662, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 20 avril 1683, à Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Curtis Land Sr vor 30. November 1634 in Dent, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Land III 34 und seine Mutter Marye Not 37. Er hat 1662 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Hodges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 20. April 1683 in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land Sr è nato il prima del 30 novembre 1634 nel Dent, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Land III, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Marye Not, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Hodges nel 1662, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 20 aprile 1683, nel Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Curtis Land Srが1634年11月30日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアデントで生まれた時，父William Land IIIは34歳，母Marye Notは37歳であった。1662年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でMary Hodgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1683年4月20日以後にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Curtis Land Sr(이)가 1634년 11월 30일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 덴트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Land III(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Marye Not(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1662년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Mary Hodges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1683년 4월 20일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land Sr nasceu antes 30 de novembro de 1634, em Dent, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Land III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Marye Not, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hodges em 1662, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 20 de abril de 1683, em Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Curtis Land Sr родился перед 30 ноябрь 1634 г. в местности дент, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Land III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Marye Not, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hodges в 1662 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 20 апрель 1683 г. в местности чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Curtis Land Sr nació antes de 30 de noviembre de 1634, en Dent, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Land III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Marye Not, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Mary Hodges en 1662, en Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 20 de abril de 1683, en Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.
